Charlene Weiß

Postdoctoral researcher in discrete mathematics

Home Research CV Teaching Contact

Otto von Guericke University Magdeburg

In the winter semester 2024/2025, I was the lecturer for two courses:

  • Mathematik 3 für Informatik (for bachelor’s students, content: differential equations, numerical analysis, probability theory, statistics),
  • Diskrete Mathematik (for bachelor’s students).

Paderborn University

At Paderborn University, I was a teaching assistant for several courses (all taught in German), see below.

In 2020, the Faculty of Electronic Engineering, Computer Science and Mathematics of Paderborn University awarded me the Weierstraß-Prize for excellent teaching.

Taught exercise courses:

  • Algebra (for bachelor’s students, summer semester 2020).

  • Algebraische Kombinatorik—Assoziationsschemata (for master’s students, summer semesters in 2018 and 2022).

  • Analysis für Informatiker (for bachelor’s students, winter semester 2019/2020).

  • Codierungstheorie (for bachelor’s students, winter semester 2020/2021).

  • Kombinatorik (for master’s students, winter semesters 2017/2018 and 2021/2022).

  • Lineare Algebra für Informatiker (for bachelor’s students, summer semesters 2021 and 2023).

  • Lineare Algebra 1 (for bachelor’s students, winter semester 2018/2019).

  • Lineare Algebra 2 (for bachelor’s students, summer semester 2019 and winter semester 2022/2023).
